name: virtforce-swarm-engine
description: An isolated multi-agent software development and DevOps management container swarm, offering automated code development, QA verification, security sanitization, and web crawler ingress with real-time performance analytics.

tools.name: refine_code
tools.description: Refines source code asynchronously inside an air-gapped node sandbox based on human feedback or QA audit issues.

taskId.description: The unique ID of the development sub-task

originalCode.description: The raw TypeScript or React source code requiring changes

feedback.description: Specific human instructions or compiled error message stack traces to resolve

file.description: Relative file path context within target workspace

tools.name: web_ingress_crawl
tools.description: Crawls and reverse-engineers visual websites or docker webhook schemas into actionable agent task backlogs.

strategy.description: Method of acquiring file context patterns

tools.name: simulate_forecast
tools.description: Executes monte-carlo resource simulations protecting LLM budget margins for a specified workspace stack.

tools.name: post_messenger_command
tools.description: Proxies incoming mobile WhatsApp or Telegram commands to local sandbox supervisor sockets.

prompts.name: review-pull-request
prompts.description: Prepares the CEO and QA audit prompt constraints for validating staged DevOps patches.
